title: Agent feedback findings closeout
goal: Record the implementation and proof for feedback-derived issues #388-#392.
non_goals: Make GitHub or any other tracker a package dependency
Turn repo-local self-improvement workflow into shipped package doctrine

review_mode.review question: Were the feedback-derived findings implemented with compact, package-agnostic surfaces and enough proof?
review_mode.inputs inspected first: agent-feedback-prompt.txt evaluation findings; issues #388-#392; agentic-workspace report/summary/proof output

review_method.commands used: uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --format json; uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json; uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed <paths> --format json; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run pytest tests/test_contract_tooling.py -q; cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py; uv run ruff check src tests; cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; uv run agentic-workspace reconcile --format json

issue_classifications.title: [Review]: Add ordinary agent path summary
issue_classifications.evidence: Implemented by commit 1fe7cf4 in report_profile.ordinary_agent_path with test coverage in tests/test_workspace_cli.py.

issue_classifications.title: [Review]: Mark historical reviews as evidence-only unless selected
issue_classifications.evidence: Implemented by commit 1fe7cf4 in closeout_trust.historical_review_artifacts with report-router coverage.

issue_classifications.title: [Review]: Explain why report sections matter now
issue_classifications.evidence: Implemented by commit 1fe7cf4 in section_hints[].why_now with test coverage in tests/test_workspace_cli.py.

issue_classifications.title: [Review]: Quiet idle planning projections further
issue_classifications.evidence: Implemented by commit 1fe7cf4 in compact planning summary projection_state and idle reason_code coverage.

issue_classifications.title: [Review]: Normalize agent feedback artifacts
issue_classifications.evidence: Implemented by commit 1fe7cf4 with src/agentic_workspace/contracts/schemas/agent_feedback.schema.json and schema validation coverage.

retention.proof surface: agentic-workspace proof-selected workspace_cli and planning_package lanes

validation_commands: uv run ruff check src tests
cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py
cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
drift_log: 2026-04-26: Review created from feedback-driven self-improvement closeout.
